backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: the GameSection component with iframe embedding and the 'Play the Game' header navigation item, both with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short descriptions, serving as a reference summary of each component's purpose and content.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Teen Boundaries Advocacy Website' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles all page sections in order, including the GameSection inserted between ActionStepsForTeens and SourcesCitations.
frontend/src/components/ActionStepsForTe: Section component rendering five numbered action steps for teens on setting boundaries, with icons, descriptions, and supplementary callout cards.
frontend/src/components/GameSection.tsx: Section component that embeds the Boundary Setting Game for Teens via an iframe with a fullscreen toggle, and displays a styled fallback CTA button if the iframe fails to load.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with smooth-scroll links including a highlighted '🎮 Play the Game' item, a logo with fallback, and a mobile 'Play Game' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for a teen relationship health site, featuring a background image, headline, mission statement, a statistics callout from Our Watch (June 2025), and a scroll-to-next CTA button.
frontend/src/components/SourcesCitations: Footer component that renders a numbered list of academic/organizational citations with external links, plus a Caffeine.ai referral attribution link.
frontend/src/components/StatisticsThatMa: Section component displaying four key statistics about teen relationship boundaries as styled cards with large numbers, descriptions, and sourced links to HelpGuide and Our Watch.
frontend/src/components/TrustHealthyRela: Section component covering four pillars of healthy relationships (communication, consent, mutual respect, warning signs) alongside a featured expert blockquote styled on a teal gradient background.
frontend/src/components/TypesOfBoundarie: Section component presenting three types of personal boundaries (physical, emotional, and a third truncated type) as styled cards with icons, descriptions, and bullet-point examples.
frontend/src/components/WhyBoundariesMat: React section component displaying three informational pillars (Emotional Well-Being, Self-Esteem, Safe Choices) about why boundaries matter for teens, with icons, styled cards, and supporting text.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base styles, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and utility classes for gradients and text effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Nunito, Playfair Display), OKLCH-based color palettes (coral, teal, cream), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the boundary-setting teen advocacy site's features, architectural notes, and a pending request to correctly implement and embed the Boundary Setting Game for Teens from a Figma link.
